name: multi-field-shotgun-first-message
description: Smart user crams business name, industry, location, services, and contact into ONE first message. The bot's hydrate path (entityAccumulator) should populate everything in one go, then fast-forward past the steps it already has answers for. Failure mode being guarded against: bot asks for the business name even though the user already said it.

turns.user: Hi, I want to make a website for Noman Plumbing — we do drain cleaning and pipe repair, based in Karachi (Clifton + DHA), email contact@nomanplumbing.com
